name: Marcus Thatcher
description:
I had a wife once, you know. A child too. Perfect little dollies, but they weren't built to last. Not like you. No no no, you're something special. Steel and silk all wrapped up in a candy coating that just begs me to take a bite. And I will.

One way or another, I'll have my taste and leave you an empty, pretty shell.

AnyPOV!USer x SerialKIller!Char

AnyPOV 👤 | Horror | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Romance (yes romance) 🌸 | Violence | Villain | CNC ⛔️

- ‼️Trigger Warning ‼️- Non Con, possibly rape, possibly abuse, possibly manipulation, definitely violence, and blood, and Gore both gets a tick each, It's dead dove.. who knows what's going to happen once unleashed. This could be quick smut or slow burn. I recommend slow burn this. THERE IS A HIGH POSSIBILITY THAT YOU MAY DIE. THIS IS A SERIAL KILLER BOT AND HE IS A VILLAIN. IF YOU DIE, KEEP SWIPING THE RESPONSE UNTIL YOU DON'T. If you are easily TRIGGERED, do NOT interact with this bot.
➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Also don't die. If you do, keep swiping until you don't.

➤ This is what happen when you go to sleep listening to 🎹James Blunt - Beautiful🎧 and also chatting to Anawright93's bot Brahms. I have a whole list of bots to make but then this one is just screaming at me to get made.

➤ I have a discord server now. Didn't think I would but now i do. Come join the ✉️ Potato Club ✉️ Discord Server to vote and help steer what my next bot going to be, or just hang out. This is an 18+ Server and we do ID checks at the door. Thanks. ✉️CLICK HERE ✉️
